name: I Don't Hate The Rain
overview: Launa, a beautiful and cheerful girl, falls in love with Karang, a man with two personalities. Struggling between his shattered identity and sadness, Karang tries to escape from his true self, haunted by a traumatic past with his mother, Andira, who was harsh and never showed him affection. While Launa fights to bring him back to his true self, will she be able to open the heart of a man who only longs for his mother's embrace?

trailers.title: Aku Tak Membenci Hujan | Trailer | Jeff Smith, Aisyah Aqilah, Gabriel Prince
